resources.string: Restore your data from a previously exported backup. Select the encrypted ZIP file and enter the password you used during export.
Unsupported backup version (%1$d). This app supports version %2$d.
The selected file is not a valid ZIP archive.
The backup is incomplete or corrupted. It may not be a valid backup.
Could not read the selected file.
Failed to save data to the database. The app may be in an inconsistent state.
Photos could not be restored after data was saved. The app may be in an inconsistent state.
Some photos could not be verified after extraction. The app may be in an inconsistent state.
Data was imported but settings could not be saved. The app may be in an inconsistent state.
